title: chenopodium album var. incanum
intro: Chenopodium album var. incanum, also known as white goosefoot or lamb's quarters, is a variety of the Chenopodium album plant that is commonly found in wetlands and along waterways. The medicinal properties of Chenopodium album var. incanum include its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant has several health benefits, including its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Chenopodium album var. incanum can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
